name: 41904774-9d42-40f5-ab86-98f117282e28

agentUtterance.text: What can I help you with today?

userUtterance.text: I don't even know where to start today. I have too much going on.

agentUtterance.text: It is completely normal to feel overwhelmed when everything is moving fast. We can take this one step at a time. Would you like to do a quick review of your agenda, or should we jump into your current coaching module to get grounded?

playbookInput.precedingConversationSummary: The user has asked a vague question.

playbookOutput.executionSummary: Customer feels overwhelmed and agent offers to review the agenda or start a coaching module.

description: Teach the AI not to guess if the user is completely vague, but to offer the core structured options.
